title: In clause with 'NATURAL RIGHT JOIN' and 'union'  does not work as expected
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)
```
create table chqin(id int, f1 date);
insert into chqin values (1,null);
insert into chqin values (2,null);
insert into chqin values (3,null);

create table chqin2(id int, f1 date);
insert into chqin2 values (1,'1990-11-27');
insert into chqin2 values (2,'1990-11-27');
insert into chqin2 values (3,'1990-11-27');

select 1 from chqin where  '2008-05-28' NOT IN(select a1.f1 from chqin a1 NATURAL RIGHT JOIN chqin2 a2 WHERE a2.f1  >='1990-11-27' union select f1 from chqin where id=5);
select 1 from chqin where  '2008-05-28' NOT IN(select a1.f1 from chqin a1  union select f1 from chqin where id=5);
```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

result from mysql:

```
MySQL [test2]> select 1 from chqin where  '2008-05-28' NOT IN(select a1.f1 from chqin a1 NATURAL RIGHT JOIN chqin2 a2 WHERE a2.f1  >='1990-11-27' union select f1 from chqin where id=5);
Empty set (0.01 sec)
```


### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
results from tidb:
```
MySQL [test2]> select 1 from chqin where  '2008-05-28' NOT IN(select a1.f1 from chqin a1 NATURAL RIGHT JOIN chqin2 a2 WHERE a2.f1  >='1990-11-27' union select f1 from chqin where id=5);
+---+
| 1 |
+---+
| 1 |
| 1 |
| 1 |
+---+
3 rows in set (0.01 sec)

```
### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)
```
MySQL [test2]> select tidb_version();
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| tidb_version()                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Release Version: v8.5.1
Edition: Community
Git Commit Hash: fea86c8e35ad4a86a5e1160701f99493c2ee547c
Git Branch: HEAD
UTC Build Time: 2025-01-16 07:38:34
GoVersion: go1.23.4
Race Enabled: false
Check Table Before Drop: false
Store: tikv |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
1 row in set (0.01 sec)

```
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table1(id INT, f1 DATE, f2 VARCHAR(50));
CREATE TABLE test_table2(id INT, f1 DATE, f3 INT);
SELECT 1 FROM test_table1 WHERE '2023-01-01' NOT IN (SELECT f1 FROM test_table1 JOIN test_table2 ON test_table1.id = test_table2.id WHERE f3 > 50 UNION SELECT f1 FROM test_table1 WHERE id = 3);
key_bug_features: NATURAL RIGHT JOIN with UNION in NOT IN clause
